rules.purpose: End negation span at sentence/coordinator terminators
fixes: do not need X. I only want Y

rules.purpose: Mark subject as negated in 'X is not finalized/approved/ready' frames
Preserve all non-negated service atoms as service_secondary in first-mention order
Tag if/would/could sales pressure as counterfactual or conditional before pricing/timeline/doc gates
Contact info updates should classify without requiring response to echo PII
